prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年约第 63 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 71→2026 年第 63）；2024 年曾出现师德师风负面舆情（副教授被举报性骚扰），但抖音综合热度排名第 15（高热），手写录取通知书等正面传播广泛；2025–2026 年声誉信号未见明显异常；教育学、心理学、中国语言文学均为 A- 学科，在师范类院校中实力突出，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范类专业社会热度近年平稳偏升；广东省 2026 年物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年（44.0 万）增加约 3.6%，竞争略有加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 436 分，近年波动不大；陕西师范大学位于西安，属西北地区，对广东考生而言属跨省报考；该校在广东招生规模适中，2026 年物理类计划 94 人，占比较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 50831、2026 年物理类大幅缩招约 16%（缓解竞争）、广东物理类考生增加约 3.6%（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉平稳偏正面等因素，缩招的缓解效应略大于考生增加的加剧效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年有所前移；预测最低位次约 45899 名，区间 45399–46399 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 27900→31291→90865 (gap in 2023)→36985→50831, showing a clear backward trend in recent years, with a baseline of about 50831 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 101 in 2021, 119 in 2022–2023, 114 in 2024, and 112 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 94, a reduction of about 16% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years (71st in 2021→63rd in 2026); in 2024, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment), but the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 15th (high heat), with positive widespread dissemination of handwritten admission letters; no significant anomalies in reputation signals for 2025–2026; Education, Psychology, and Chinese Language and Literature are all A- disciplines, showing strong strength among normal universities, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal majors has been steadily rising in recent years; the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025 (440,000), slightly intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 436, with little fluctuation in recent years; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, in the northwest region, which is a cross-province application for Guangdong examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Guangdong is moderate, with 94 Physics Category slots in 2026, a relatively small proportion, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 50831, the significant reduction in Physics Category enrollment by about 16% in 2026 (easing competition), the increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees by about 3.6% (intensifying competition), and the generally stable and positive university reputation, the easing effect of enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the intensifying effect of examinee increase, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking is about 45899, with a range of 45399–46399.
